zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean I de Preuilly於1110年出生在法國崔傑時，他的父親Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendôme30歲，母親Mathilde de Châteaudun31歲。他與Richilde de Lavardin結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1182年在法國布格尼艾福可斯-庫斯-素-洛易拉 加利艾-素-洛易享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean I de Preuilly于1110年出生在法国崔傑时，他的父亲Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendôme30岁，母亲Mathilde de Châteaudun31岁。他与Richilde de Lavardin结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1182年在法国布格尼艾福可斯-庫斯-素-洛易拉 加利艾-素-洛易享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean I de Preuilly was born in 1110, in Cher, Centre, France, his father, Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendôme, was 30 and his mother, Mathilde de Châteaudun, was 31. He married Richilde de Lavardin. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1182, in La Charité-sur-Loire, Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Burgundy, France, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean I de Preuilly est né en 1110, à Cher, Centre, France, son père, Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendôme, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Châteaudun, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Richilde de Lavardin. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1182, à La Charité-sur-Loire, Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean I de Preuilly 1110 in Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendôme 30 und seine Mutter Mathilde de Châteaudun 31. Er hat Richilde de Lavardin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1182 im Alter von 72 Jahren in La Charité-sur-Loire, Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Burgund, Frankreich.

Lui sposato Richilde de Lavardin. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1182, nel La Charité-sur-Loire, Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 72 anni.

ko.La Charite Sur Loire, Nievre, Bourgogne,: 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 코스니-쿠르스-수-로이르 라 처이트e-수-로이르
ko.lifeSummary: Jean I de Preuilly(이)가 1110년 프랑스 세트르 처에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendôme(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Châteaudun(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Richilde de Lavardin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1182년 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 코스니-쿠르스-수-로이르 라 처이트e-수-로이르에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean I de Preuilly nasceu em 1110, em Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendôme, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Châteaudun, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Richilde de Lavardin. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1182, em La Charité-sur-Loire, Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Bourgogne, França, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean I de Preuilly родился в 1110 г. в местности чир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendôme было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Châteaudun, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Richilde de Lavardin. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1182 г. в местности ла чаритe-сур-лоир, косне-коурс-сур-лоир, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean I de Preuilly nació en 1110, en Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendôme, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Châteaudun, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Richilde de Lavardin. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1182, en La Charité-sur-Loire, Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 72 años.
